zh.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren是Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II的兒子，於1180年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格。他和Irmelgard Stolzhirsh至少有1個兒子。他去世於1248年在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren是Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II的儿子，于1180年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格。他和Irmelgard Stolzhirsh至少有1个儿子。他去世于1248年在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sparren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Perrin
meanings: French and English: from the Old French and Middle English personal name Perrin, a pet form of Old French Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perine , Perrine , and Prine .

History: Henri Perrin from Louargat in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Jeanne Merrin in Montreal, QC, in 1661. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variants or altered forms Perrine and Pareyn) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the Huguenot ancestors was Daniel Perrin (1642–1719), nicknamed The Huguenot, who arrived in New York in 1665, aboard the Philip, and settled first in NJ and later on Staten Island. Among his descendants the surname is common in the altered forms Perrine, Perine and Prine. The Staten Island community of Huguenot is named after Daniel Perrin and other Huguenots who settled in the area during the late 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

One of the Huguenot ancestors was Daniel Perrin (1642–1719), nicknamed The Huguenot, who arrived in New York in 1665, aboard the Philip, and settled first in NJ and later on Staten Island. Among his descendants the surname is common in the altered forms Perrine, Perine and Prine. The Staten Island community of Huguenot is named after Daniel Perrin and other Huguenots who settled in the area during the late 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Rudiger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hrōd ‘fame’ + gēr ‘spear’. This is the name of a hero in the Nibelungenlied. See Roger .

en.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren was born in 1180, in Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany as the son of Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. He had at least 1 son with Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. He died in 1248, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren est né en 1180, à Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, fils de Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. Il est décédé en 1248, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren wurde 1180 in Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland, als Sohn von Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II geboren. Er hatte mit Irmelgard Stolzhirsh mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1248 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren è nato il nel 1180 nel Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Germania come figlio di Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. Morì nel 1248, nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parrenは1180年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アウグスブルグでRüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren IIの息子として生まれた。彼はIrmelgard Stolzhirshとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1248年にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren(은)는 1180년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그에서 Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Irmelgard Stolzhirsh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1248년 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren nasceu em 1180, em Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha filho de Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. Ele faleceu em 1248, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren родился в 1180 г. в местности ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия. Его отца звали Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. Он умер в 1248 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rudiger Langenmantel von Sparren III     parren nació en 1180, en Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania como hijo de Rüdiger Langenmantel von Sparren II. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Irmelgard Stolzhirsh. Murió en 1248, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 68 años.
